title: REAL rounding seems to depend on FROM clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value Float64 NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value = CAST(8366271098608253588 AS Float64);
CREATE TABLE another_table (name String, ref_id UInt64, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
key_bug_features: Floating-point rounding depends on the FROM clause
